topic_coverage.quoted_user_text: Sync status must leave running after manual exchange sync completes; forecast, subscriptions, wealth, and Grafana analytics must show data derived from 922 synced transactions; Grafana panels must not fail with UNION SQL syntax errors.

backend/src/sync/mod.rs RunMode::ExchangesOnly missing finish_sync_run; backend/src/subscriptions/detection.rs and recurrence/group.rs payee_key from description; grafana/provisioning/dashboards/analytics/portfolio.json invalid UNION ALL; wealth upsert in run_exchanges_and_alerts; forecast_balance_daily and net_worth_snapshots tables; subscription_patterns.

US-0010 external profile financegnome.omniflow.cc post-BUG-0003 recovery (DATABASE_HOST=postgres, 922 txs synced); do not read .env secrets; BUG-0002/0003 OPEN tracks separate; wallet extension console noise out of scope; plan-vs-actual 404 expected when no active plan.

After manual_exchanges sync: GET /api/v1/sync/status state not running with finished_at set; GET /api/v1/subscriptions returns detected patterns for known recurring payees; forecast API returns balance series per account; net_worth_snapshots populated; Grafana portfolio pie panel SQL returns 200 not pq UNION error; representative analytics dashboards show non-empty values with account_id variable.

Operator confirms sync UI no longer stuck on running manual_exchanges; subscriptions page lists recurring charges matching ledger; forecast and wealth views show account data; Grafana analytics dashboards render without SQL 500/400; BUG-0004 acceptance rows I+J+K+L checked on external profile.

decomposition.rationale: Same operator session on US-0010 external financegnome.omniflow.cc after stack recovery (922 transactions synced); sub-defects I (stuck manual_exchanges run), J (empty subscription detection), K (Grafana UNION SQL), L (empty forecast/wealth/analytics despite data) share post-sync pipeline / analytics wiring and are tracked under BUG-0004 for discovery decomposition.
alternatives_considered: Separate BUG ids per symptom — rejected to avoid duplicate environment/evidence blocks; fixes remain independently testable via sub-defect acceptance rows I/J/K/L
Merge into BUG-0003 — rejected: BUG-0003 targets DATABASE_HOST cascade / Bitunix registry / datasource host; post-recovery symptoms are distinct pipeline and SQL defects
